steps: "Submit IB 92 Universeel form to Belastingdienst claiming refund of excess withholding tax on Unilever NV dividend",
"Provide ABN AMRO Custody statement showing 25% tax withheld vs. 15% NL-NO treaty rate",
"Include Norwegian tax residency certificate to support treaty benefit eligibility",
"Request refund of EUR 22,193.60 representing difference between 25% standard rate and 15% treaty rate"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
